A_adaptive_bestof_affix.description: best-of-{affix x segmentation x slot} adaptive null for A- prefixation

B_cross_site_bothdir.description: adaptive both-direction cross-site null (best-of-affix must clear BOTH HT splits)

C_libation_random_anchor.description: adaptive random-anchor-system null for libation rigid order
C_libation_random_anchor.note: 0-inversions alone is CHEAP (most random systems have few co-occurring pairs, so a rigid order is trivially achievable); the observed strength is 10 co-occurring pairs ALL consistent. adaptive_p counts random systems reaching >= observed pairs, all perfect.

D_ledger_random_anchor.description: adaptive random-anchor null for ledger KU-RO terminal-slot positive
D_ledger_random_anchor.note: positional-selection DOF only; the KU-RO='total' arithmetic sum-consistency (E2 7/31 exact) is a SEPARATE relative-structure corroboration not reproduced by position shuffling.

shuffled_sign_labels_relabel.note: global relabeling leaves the max productivity EXACTLY invariant -> confirms the structure is value-blind (relabeling-invariant); this is a positive control, not a null.

F_value_layer_fp.interpretation: held-out structural read-count is identical under every value relabeling -> the value layer carries 0 selection-exploitable bits; no value positive can be suppressed because none is distinguishable from its relabeled twins (H3 / I1: >=10^27 twins).

A_prefixation.adaptive_null: best-of-{195 affix x 8 seg x 2 slot}
A_prefixation.note: null best-of mean 36.98 (selection inflates from single-affix 23.9); obs 47 at ~99.2 pctile

A_cross_site_generalization.adaptive_null: best-of-affix must clear BOTH HT splits
A_cross_site_generalization.note: best-of-affix reaches min>=16 in 42pct; nominal cross-site significance is a selection artifact. A- presence off-HT is descriptively real (raw initial-A rate higher off-HT) but adds no independent p.

libation_rigid_order.note: 0-inversions alone cheap (61pct of random systems); reaching >=10 all-consistent pairs = 2.8pct

ledger_KURO_terminal.adaptive_null: random recurring ledger words (positional selection DOF)
ledger_KURO_terminal.note: 0/500 random anchors match KU-RO terminal+adjacency; arithmetic sum-consistency (E2 7/31) is separate corroboration

value_layer.note: 0 bits of value info (relabeling-invariant); every campaign value claim is null and none was suppressed

seals.seal_selection_multiplicity: 5 seals, 3 positive; Bonferroni x5 on parents: SEAL_2 0.04, SEAL_3 0.01, SEAL_4 0.15

campaign_wide.verdict: NULLS_CONFIRM_NULLS: value layer FP rate = chance; 3/4 L2L3 positives survive best-of-selection; the cross-site NOMINAL significance is the one selection artifact identified
